title: DHS Kancheepuram Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 03 Social Worker, Registrar and Other Posts
description: District Health Society (DHS) Kancheepuram has issued the official notification for 2026. To fill the vacancies for 03 Registrar, Audiologist, and Social Worker Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in B.Sc Nursing, Any Degree, M.Sc, MBBS, BAMS, or BHMS can grab this chance and apply for the DHS Kancheepuram Recruitment 2026 . Here we have included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for mor...
